title: Digital Transactions Highlights Matera's Role in FedNow QR Code Test
excerpt: This article covers a successful demonstration of QR code-initiated payments over the FedNow network and how it opens the door to fast, secure, and seamless tr
body:
This article covers a successful demonstration of QR code–initiated payments over the FedNow network and how it opens the door to fast, secure, and seamless transactions for consumers and businesses. The project was a collaboration between Matera, Payfinia, Star One Credit Union, and members of the X9 Payments QR Code Working Group, showcasing industry-wide efforts to advance real-time payment solutions.

Read the full article on [Digital Transactions](https://www.digitaltransactions.net/qr-codes-make-a-splash-in-the-real-time-payments-pool/).
